summary: Good-quality audience recording of a solid show, praised for its overall sound despite being another crowd tape.
review: The reviewer, an experienced collector, notes that the Grateful Dead’s shows generally sound fantastic and appreciates having more recordings circulated. While he isn’t thrilled about yet‑another audience capture, he finds this tape to be among the better ones and rates it positively. No specific musical moments or song details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but a 4‑star rating and generally positive language indicate a good show with acceptable audience recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer finds the tape decent for an audience source; no specific issues noted, implying reasonable clarity for this type of recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
